sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15611" key="a)rthri/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτηρίᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bronchitis,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
